candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Pass a trusted/BTF-typed object obtained from a verifier-recognized source. Casts from unrelated pointers will not satisfy this call.
candidate_repairs.rationale: The verifier sees R1 as a stack pointer (fp), but this call requires one of: a typed pointer, a trusted pointer, an RCU-protected pointer.

evidence.detail: rejected at <source>:11: long err = bpf_d_path(&file_path, path_buffer, sizeof(path_buffer));
The verifier sees R1 as a stack pointer (fp), but this call requires one of: a typed pointer, a trusted pointer, an RCU-protected pointer.
Verifier symptom: R1 type=fp expected=ptr_, trusted_ptr_, rcu_ptr_
No earlier dominating proof-establishing branch or narrowing was found.
